title: dioscorea dallmannensis
intro: Dioscorea dallmannensis, also known as Dallmann's yam, is a species of yam native to Borneo. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dioscorea dallmannensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Dioscorea dallmannensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its root is sometimes consumed as a food supplement.
